name: disgusted
description: Measures disgusted/repulsed vs delighted/pleased emotional tone in language

pairs.positive: The smell from the dumpster behind the restaurant made my stomach turn.
pairs.negative: The aroma drifting from the restaurant kitchen was absolutely mouthwatering.

pairs.positive: I gagged when I found mold growing on the leftovers I'd forgotten about.
pairs.negative: I was delighted to find the leftovers still fresh and ready to reheat.

pairs.positive: The slimy texture of the overcooked okra made me push the plate away.
pairs.negative: The perfectly roasted vegetables had a satisfying crunch I couldn't get enough of.

pairs.positive: The public restroom was so filthy I turned around and walked out.
pairs.negative: The public restroom was spotless and well-maintained, a pleasant surprise.

pairs.positive: Watching them chew with their mouth open made me lose my appetite entirely.
pairs.negative: Sharing a meal with someone who savors every bite makes dining a pleasure.

pairs.positive: The river was choked with trash and the water looked toxic.
pairs.negative: The river was crystal clear and the water looked pure enough to drink.

pairs.positive: I recoiled when I stepped on something wet and unidentifiable on the carpet.
pairs.negative: I loved the feeling of the soft, clean carpet under my bare feet.

pairs.positive: The greasy, congealed sauce on the plate was revolting to look at.
pairs.negative: The glossy, well-reduced sauce on the plate looked like a work of art.

pairs.positive: The hotel room had a stale, musty odor that clung to everything.
pairs.negative: The hotel room smelled fresh and clean, with crisp linens on the bed.

pairs.positive: I was repulsed by the hypocrisy of the politician's speech about integrity.
pairs.negative: I was moved by the sincerity and conviction in the speaker's words.

pairs.positive: The spoiled milk hit my nose before I even opened the fridge fully.
pairs.negative: The fresh milk was cold and creamy, perfect for my morning coffee.

pairs.positive: The sticky residue on the movie theater seat made my skin crawl.
pairs.negative: The movie theater seats were plush and freshly cleaned, very comfortable.

pairs.positive: I found a hair in my soup and immediately flagged the waiter.
pairs.negative: The soup was flawless, every spoonful rich and perfectly seasoned.

pairs.positive: The sewage backup in the basement produced a stench I'll never forget.
pairs.negative: The basement was dry and smelled faintly of cedar from the new shelving.

pairs.positive: The manipulative tactics used in the ad campaign made me feel sick.
pairs.negative: The ad campaign was clever and genuine, and I actually enjoyed watching it.

pairs.positive: The soggy, lukewarm sandwich from the vending machine was barely edible.
pairs.negative: The freshly pressed sandwich from the cafe was warm and delicious.

pairs.positive: I was disgusted by how carelessly the packaging waste was dumped in the park.
pairs.negative: I was pleased to see volunteers keeping the park clean and litter-free.

pairs.positive: The curdled cream in my coffee made me dump the whole cup immediately.
pairs.negative: The fresh cream swirled beautifully into my coffee and tasted wonderful.

pairs.positive: The overflowing garbage bins on the street corner were nauseating in the heat.
pairs.negative: The flower boxes on the street corner filled the warm air with a lovely scent.

pairs.positive: The way they exploited their employees' trust was morally repugnant.
pairs.negative: The way they invested in their employees' growth was genuinely admirable.

pairs.positive: I couldn't finish the documentary about factory farming; it turned my stomach.
pairs.negative: The documentary about sustainable farming was inspiring and gave me hope.

pairs.positive: The matted, unwashed wig on display looked absolutely grotesque.
pairs.negative: The freshly styled wig on display looked silky and beautifully crafted.

pairs.positive: The rancid butter ruined the entire batch of cookies and the whole kitchen reeked.
pairs.negative: The fresh butter made the cookies golden and fragrant, filling the kitchen with warmth.

pairs.positive: I was appalled by the cruelty I witnessed at the roadside animal attraction.
pairs.negative: I was charmed by how well the animals were cared for at the sanctuary.

pairs.positive: The thick layer of grease coating the stovetop was revolting to touch.
pairs.negative: The freshly wiped stovetop gleamed and I was happy to start cooking.

pairs.positive: The taste of the expired medicine made me gag involuntarily.
pairs.negative: The herbal tea tasted smooth and soothing as it went down.

pairs.positive: The algae-covered pond smelled putrid and attracted swarms of flies.
pairs.negative: The garden pond was clear and serene, with koi gliding beneath the surface.

pairs.positive: I couldn't stand the sickly sweet air freshener masking something worse underneath.
pairs.negative: The natural lavender scent in the room was subtle and genuinely relaxing.

pairs.positive: The graphic scene in the horror film made half the audience cover their eyes.
pairs.negative: The beautifully shot scene in the film made the audience lean forward in wonder.

pairs.positive: The mildew stains creeping across the bathroom ceiling filled me with revulsion.
pairs.negative: The freshly painted bathroom ceiling looked bright and immaculate.

pairs.positive: The drain was clogged with a clump of hair and black sludge that reeked.
pairs.negative: The drain was clear and the water flowed away quickly without a trace of odor.

pairs.positive: I bit into the fruit and found it rotten and mealy inside.
pairs.negative: I bit into the fruit and it was perfectly ripe, sweet, and juicy.

pairs.positive: The dog rolled in something dead and the stench filled the entire house.
pairs.negative: The dog came back from the groomer smelling fresh and looking fluffy.

pairs.positive: The communal kitchen sponge was brown, slimy, and smelled like decay.
pairs.negative: The brand new kitchen sponge was clean and firm, ready for use.

pairs.positive: The wound was infected and the pus made me look away immediately.
pairs.negative: The wound had healed beautifully, leaving only a faint clean scar.

pairs.positive: I opened the container of forgotten rice and a wave of sour funk hit me.
pairs.negative: I opened the container of freshly cooked rice and warm fragrant steam drifted up.

pairs.positive: The lake was full of scum and dead fish floating belly-up along the shore.
pairs.negative: The lake was pristine and the fish were darting beneath the glassy surface.

pairs.positive: Someone left chewed gum stuck to the bottom of my desk and I touched it.
pairs.negative: Someone left a small wrapped chocolate on my desk as a thoughtful surprise.

pairs.positive: The locker room smelled like mildew, sweat, and something I couldn't identify.
pairs.negative: The locker room was freshly ventilated with clean towels stacked neatly on the bench.

pairs.positive: I pulled back the shower curtain and found a thick ring of black mold.
pairs.negative: I pulled back the shower curtain and the tiles gleamed white and spotless.

pairs.positive: The rat left droppings all along the kitchen counter overnight.
pairs.negative: The kitchen counter was wiped clean and everything was in its place that morning.

pairs.positive: The compost bin had turned into a writhing mass of maggots in the heat.
pairs.negative: The garden compost had broken down into dark, rich, earthy-smelling soil.

pairs.positive: The politician's performative empathy while gutting public services was sickening.
pairs.negative: The politician's genuine concern for public services came through in every decision.

pairs.positive: I peeled back the bandage and the smell of the infected cut made me retch.
pairs.negative: I peeled back the bandage and the cut had closed cleanly, pink and healthy.

pairs.positive: The airplane seat was sticky and the tray table had dried food caked on it.
pairs.negative: The airplane seat was comfortable and the tray table was wiped clean and ready.

pairs.positive: The fridge had leaked and the floor underneath was covered in foul-smelling slime.
pairs.negative: The floor under the fridge was clean and dry, just as it should be.

pairs.positive: The unethical data harvesting practices of the company made my skin crawl.
pairs.negative: The company's transparent data practices gave me confidence in their integrity.

pairs.positive: The grease trap at the restaurant hadn't been cleaned in weeks and it showed.
pairs.negative: The restaurant kitchen was spotless, with stainless steel surfaces that practically sparkled.

pairs.positive: I found a cockroach crawling inside the cereal box when I poured my breakfast.
pairs.negative: I poured the cereal and it was perfectly crunchy and fresh from the sealed bag.

pairs.positive: The portable toilet at the festival was overflowing and the line still stretched around it.
pairs.negative: The restroom facilities at the festival were clean and well-maintained with no wait.

pairs.positive: The milk had separated into chunks and the smell when I opened it was vile.
pairs.negative: The milk was cold and fresh, pouring smoothly into the glass.

pairs.positive: The neglected aquarium was green with algae and the water smelled like rot.
pairs.negative: The aquarium water was crystal clear and the fish looked vibrant and healthy.

pairs.positive: I stepped barefoot into something cold and wet the cat had left on the floor.
pairs.negative: I stepped onto the heated floor tiles and the warmth was immediately soothing.

pairs.positive: The way they scapegoated the intern for their own failure was utterly contemptible.
pairs.negative: The way they credited the intern publicly for the project's success was genuinely heartwarming.

pairs.positive: The dumpster juice had leaked across the sidewalk and the flies were swarming.
pairs.negative: The sidewalk was freshly washed and the morning air smelled clean after the rain.

pairs.positive: The leftover fish in the office microwave made the entire floor unbearable.
pairs.negative: Someone baked fresh cookies in the office kitchen and the whole floor smelled wonderful.

pairs.positive: The moldy grout between the tiles was black and releasing spores into the air.
pairs.negative: The freshly sealed grout between the tiles was bright white and perfectly clean.

pairs.positive: The way the company covered up safety violations while employees got sick was repulsive.
pairs.negative: The company's swift response to safety concerns and transparent communication was reassuring.

pairs.positive: The old mattress had yellow stains and a sour smell that no amount of cleaning could fix.
pairs.negative: The new mattress was firm and clean, wrapped in crisp fresh sheets.

pairs.positive: The congealed fat floating on top of the cold soup was enough to ruin my appetite.
pairs.negative: The warm soup had a beautiful golden broth that made me reach for a second bowl.
